evidence.local_proxy_rule: when UniRef, CATH, or InterPro evidence is unavailable, mechanism text, ligand/cofactor context, pocket geometry, and reaction/substrate mismatch signals can prioritize or block propagation but cannot promote beyond bronze by themselves

source_guardrails.rule: Family propagation requires shared mechanism family plus conserved catalytic role signatures; sequence cluster membership alone cannot promote labels above bronze.
Domain architecture can raise review priority but cannot promote across ontology families without reaction-center agreement.
Family annotations must be treated as weak evidence when mechanism text or cofactor evidence conflicts with the seed fingerprint.

When UniRef/CATH/InterPro are unavailable, use entry name, M-CSA mechanism text, cofactor ligands, and pocket geometry as auditable local proxies; keep propagated labels bronze until direct evidence promotes them.

evidence.review_rule: counterevidence routes remap-local leads to expert review; otherwise selected-structure cofactor absence makes them local structure-selection review candidates, with conservative remap evidence kept non-countable until explicit review/import evidence and factory gates clear

evidence.review_only_rule: active-queue expert-label decisions are context exports only; automation leaves them as no_decision and countable import must not add benchmark labels without external expert resolution

metadata.audit_rule: before promoting a preview batch, classify new ontology, family-propagation, cofactor, mapping, queue-composition, hard-negative, and text-leakage failure modes; accepted labels with unresolved review debt are not promotion-ready

rows.entry_name: peptide chain release factor N5-glutamine methyltransferase
